summary: Iteration 53: Frosted glass guided onboarding overlay smooth transitions and light mode verification. All features working correctly.

guided_overlay_dark_mode.notes: Overlay fades in smoothly with 0.8s animation. Shows 'STEP 1 OF 5', message icon, title 'Leave a Message for Your Loved Ones', 'Let's Go' button, 'Skip this step for now' button, close X button.

guided_overlay_light_mode.notes: Light mode correctly applies CSS vars: --guided-overlay-bg: rgba(240,247,255,0.82), --guided-title: #0F172A (dark text), --guided-desc: #475569. Text is readable with good contrast. Backdrop is light-themed frosted glass.

dashboard_flash_prevention.notes: Dashboard wrapper has opacity transition tied to dashboardReady state (set via requestAnimationFrame after loading=false). Dashboard opacity was 1 during testing (overlay on top with frosted glass).

skip_button_dismissal.notes: Clicking 'Skip this step for now' sets sessionStorage 'carryon_activation_done' flag to true and dismisses overlay. Dashboard fades in smoothly.

onboarding_api.notes: GET /api/onboarding/progress returns correct data: 5 steps (create_message, upload_document, designate_primary, customize_checklist, review_readiness), progress tracking fields (completed_count, total_steps, progress_pct, all_complete, beneficiary_names).

lets_go_navigation.notes: Clicking 'Let's Go' successfully navigates to Messages page. Light mode persists across navigation.

critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding progress check now runs IN PARALLEL with estate data fetch (lines 74-84 in DashboardPage.js) - good optimization
Dashboard content has opacity:0 until dashboardReady state is true (line 387) - prevents flash before overlay
All hardcoded dark colors replaced with CSS variables that adapt to [data-theme='light'] - properly implemented in index.css lines 174-181
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and estate
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frosted glass overlay transitions verified working in both dark and light mode. Overlay appears smoothly on dashboard load (no flash of dashboard content). Light mode CSS vars properly applied. Rate limiting is 10 req/min on auth endpoints - wait 60 seconds between login attempts.

mocked_apis.note: None - all tested features use real APIs
